name: Neiman Marcus Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeInstructions:
Blend the oatmeal first – Measure then put in food chopper to a fine powder.
1. Cream butter and both sugars.
2. Add eggs and vanilla.
3. Mix together with flour, oatmeal powder, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Add chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and nuts.
5. Roll into balls and place 2 inches apart on cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 6 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
This makes 112 cookies. This recipe can be divided in half very easily.
